# Find A Broker

> Independent comparisons and expert reviews of FCA-regulated trading brokers for UK retail traders.

Find A Broker (findabroker.xyz) is an independent broker comparison site focused on the UK retail trading market. All content covers FCA-regulated brokers unless explicitly stated otherwise. The site does not provide financial advice. Rankings and reviews are not influenced by affiliate relationships.

## Broker Reviews

Full reviews covering regulation, fees, platforms, instruments, pros and cons.

- [Capital.com Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/capital-com): FCA-regulated CFD and spread betting broker with an intuitive platform suited to beginners and cost-conscious traders.
- [Pepperstone Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/pepperstone): Execution-focused CFD and forex broker with tight raw spreads, MT4/MT5/cTrader access and FCA regulation.
- [IG Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/ig): One of the UK's largest and longest-established brokers, offering CFDs, spread betting, shares, ETFs, ISA and SIPP under FCA regulation.
- [CMC Markets Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/cmc-markets): FCA-regulated broker founded in 1989, known for powerful proprietary charting tools and thousands of CFD instruments.
- [Plus500 Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/plus500): FCA-regulated and London Stock Exchange-listed CFD broker with a simple proprietary platform and commission-free pricing.
- [eToro Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/etoro): FCA-regulated multi-asset platform combining stocks, ETFs, crypto and CFDs with social and copy-trading features.
- [Interactive Brokers Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/interactive-brokers): Professional-grade broker with access to 90+ markets, very low fees, ISA support and FCA regulation.
- [XTB Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/xtb): FCA-regulated broker with competitive spreads, an intuitive proprietary platform (xStation) and strong educational resources.
- [AvaTrade Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/avatrade): Multi-platform CFD broker with MT4, MT5 and copy trading — UK clients access via European/global licences.
- [FP Markets Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/fp-markets): Australian-origin broker known for tight raw spreads and MetaTrader support — UK clients trade under ASIC/CySEC regulation.
- [Trading 212 Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/trading-212): FCA-regulated zero-commission stocks, ETFs and ISA app — one of the most popular investment platforms for UK retail investors.
- [OANDA Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/oanda): Established FCA-regulated forex and CFD broker since 1996, known for competitive spreads, no minimum deposit, and quality proprietary platform.
- [Saxo Bank Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/saxo-bank): Premium FCA-regulated multi-asset broker with stocks, bonds, ETFs, options, futures, forex, ISA and SIPP — built for sophisticated investors.
- [Tickmill Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/tickmill): FCA-regulated execution-focused forex and CFD broker with raw spreads, low commissions, and MT4/MT5 support for active traders.

## Crypto Exchange Reviews

Full reviews of FCA-registered crypto exchanges for UK users buying, selling and holding actual cryptocurrency.

- [Coinbase Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/coinbase): The UK's largest FCA-registered crypto exchange (CB Payments Ltd, FRN 900635) — beginner-friendly app plus Advanced Trade for cost-conscious active buyers.
- [Kraken Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/kraken): Established crypto exchange since 2011 with a strong security record — Kraken Pro offers competitive maker 0.25% / taker 0.40% base fees for UK spot traders.
- [Crypto.com Review](https://findabroker.xyz/reviews/crypto-com): FCA-registered platform with 350+ cryptocurrencies, Visa card cashback, and staking — but very poor customer service reviews warrant careful consideration.

## Best Broker Lists

Curated broker picks by trading style and need.

- [Best Low-Cost Brokers UK 2026](https://findabroker.xyz/best/best-low-cost-brokers): Brokers with the lowest total trading cost for UK retail traders.
- [Best Brokers for Beginners UK 2026](https://findabroker.xyz/best/best-brokers-for-beginners): Simple platforms, clear pricing and strong educational resources for new traders.
- [Best MT5 Brokers UK 2026](https://findabroker.xyz/best/best-mt5-brokers): MetaTrader 5 brokers with algo trading, EA support and FCA regulation.
- [Best Regulated Brokers UK 2026](https://findabroker.xyz/best/best-regulated-brokers): Brokers with the strongest FCA oversight and client protection credentials.

## Broker Comparisons

Head-to-head breakdowns of fees, platforms, regulation and instruments.

- [Capital.com vs Pepperstone](https://findabroker.xyz/compare/capital-com-vs-pepperstone): Beginner-friendly platform vs execution-focused raw spread broker.
- [IG vs CMC Markets](https://findabroker.xyz/compare/ig-vs-cmc-markets): Two of the UK's most established CFD and spread betting brokers compared.
- [Pepperstone vs IG](https://findabroker.xyz/compare/pepperstone-vs-ig): Raw spread ECN execution vs a full-service multi-asset broker.
- [XTB vs Plus500](https://findabroker.xyz/compare/xtb-vs-plus500): xStation proprietary platform vs simple commission-free CFD trading.
- [Interactive Brokers vs IG](https://findabroker.xyz/compare/interactive-brokers-vs-ig): Professional multi-market access vs a full UK retail broker with ISA and SIPP.

## Educational Guides

Practical guides helping traders evaluate and choose brokers.

- [How to Choose a Forex Broker](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-forex-broker): Avoid overpaying or taking unnecessary regulatory risk when picking an FX broker.
- [How to Choose a CFD Broker](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-cfd-broker): Understanding cost, leverage and risk when selecting a CFD provider.
- [How to Choose a Stock Broker in the UK](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-stock-broker-uk): Costs, ISA rules and safety considerations for UK equity investors.
- [How to Choose a Crypto Broker](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-crypto-broker): Security, fees and regulatory risk when trading crypto via a broker.
- [How to Choose a Crypto Exchange in the UK](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-crypto-exchange-uk): FCA registration, fee structures (simple vs pro modes), custody risk and exchange comparisons for UK spot crypto buyers.
- [How to Compare Trading Fees Properly](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-compare-trading-fees-properly): Why "low spreads" can mislead and how to calculate true total cost.
- [How to Evaluate Broker Regulation](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-evaluate-broker-regulation): A practical framework for assessing regulatory quality across jurisdictions.
- [Spread-Only vs Commission Accounts](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-between-spread-only-and-commission-accounts): Which pricing model is actually cheaper for your trading style.
- [How to Check If a Broker Is Safe](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-check-if-a-broker-is-safe): A due diligence checklist covering regulation, fund protection and red flags.
- [How Broker Pricing Models Differ](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-broker-pricing-models-differ): Market maker, STP and ECN models explained clearly.
- [How Margin and Leverage Really Work](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-margin-and-leverage-really-work): What leverage means in practice and how it affects broker choice.
- [How Order Execution Works](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-order-execution-works): Execution types, slippage and why execution quality matters.
- [How to Choose a Broker in the UK](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-broker-in-the-uk): FCA rules, account types and cost considerations for UK traders.
- [How to Choose a Broker for MT5](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-to-choose-a-broker-for-mt5): Execution quality, costs and restrictions when trading via MetaTrader 5.
- [FCA vs Offshore Broker Regulation](https://findabroker.xyz/learn/how-broker-regulation-works-fca-vs-offshore): What FCA regulation actually provides versus offshore alternatives.

## Glossary

Plain-English definitions of key trading and brokerage terms.

- [Spread](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/spread): The difference between buy and sell price — a core trading cost.
- [Leverage](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/leverage): Trading with more exposure than your deposited capital.
- [Margin](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/margin): The deposit required to open and maintain a leveraged position.
- [Margin Call](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/margin-call): A broker's demand to deposit more funds or close positions.
- [CFD](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/cfd): Contract for Difference — a derivative product tracking an asset's price.
- [Stop Loss](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/stop-loss): An order to close a position automatically at a set loss level.
- [Slippage](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/slippage): The difference between expected and actual execution price.
- [Stop-Out Level](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/stop-out-level): The margin level at which a broker automatically closes positions.
- [Overnight Financing](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/overnight-financing): The cost of holding a leveraged position past market close.
- [Negative Balance Protection](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/negative-balance-protection): FCA-required protection preventing losses beyond deposited funds.
- [Blockchain](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/blockchain): The decentralised ledger technology underpinning Bitcoin, Ethereum and all cryptocurrencies.
- [Crypto Wallet](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/crypto-wallet): A tool that stores the cryptographic keys proving ownership of blockchain assets — custodial vs non-custodial explained.
- [Hot Wallet vs Cold Wallet](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/hot-wallet-cold-wallet): How exchanges store crypto online (hot) and offline (cold) and why the split matters for security.
- [Staking](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/staking): Locking cryptocurrency to earn network rewards — how exchanges handle it and what commission they charge.
- [Altcoin](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/altcoin): Any cryptocurrency other than Bitcoin — from Ethereum to speculative small-cap tokens.
- [Spot Trading](https://findabroker.xyz/glossary/spot-trading): Buying actual cryptocurrency at the current market price — how it differs from CFD and derivatives trading.

## Site Information

- [About](https://findabroker.xyz/about): Who runs Find A Broker — a fintech revenue operations specialist using industry knowledge to produce unbiased broker reviews.
- [Methodology](https://findabroker.xyz/methodology): How brokers are evaluated, scored and ranked — fully transparent criteria.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://findabroker.xyz/disclosure): How affiliate relationships work and why they do not influence rankings.
- [Broker Directory](https://findabroker.xyz/brokers): Full list of all reviewed brokers with filtering by market, platform and availability.
- [Broker Fee Calculator](https://findabroker.xyz/calculator): Interactive tool comparing true all-in trading costs (spread, commission, overnight financing) across 10 UK brokers by instrument and trade size.
- [Find A Broker Tool](https://findabroker.xyz/chooser): Interactive questionnaire that matches traders to brokers based on their needs.
